_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: python generic (updated)
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
A generic Python egg.

Updated with Python 3.13 support.

This will clone a git repo. Defaults to master if no branch is specified.
Installs requirements.txt automatically on install.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${PY_PACKAGES} ]]; then pip install ${PY_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi; python /home/container/{{MAIN_FILE}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Python Generic Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y git curl jq file unzip python3 python3-pip
mkdir -p /mnt/server && cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "user upload mode."; exit 0
fi

[[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]] && GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
[ -z "${USERNAME}" ] || GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"

if [ ! "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} /mnt/server
    [ ! -z "${BRANCH}" ] && git checkout ${BRANCH}
fi

[ -f /mnt/server/requirements.txt ] && pip install -r /mnt/server/requirements.txt
echo "install complete"

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Main Python file to run. Default is main.py

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest git on startup. 1 = enabled.

variables.name: Python Packages
variables.description: Extra pip packages to install. Space separated.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to 1 if uploading your own files.
